name: Inventory Scanner Skill
description: Skill file defining commands and capabilities for the iris inventory scanner
author: Mt. Diablo Iris Society

skills.name: Scan to Add
skills.description: Scan or enter a barcode code to add 1 to inventory count

skills.name: Scan to Sell
skills.description: Scan or enter a barcode code to subtract 1 from inventory count

skills.name: Force Subtract
skills.description: Force subtract 1 from inventory count regardless of mode

skills.name: Switch to Add Mode
skills.description: Switch scanner to ADD mode where scans increase count

skills.name: Switch to Sell Mode
skills.description: Switch scanner to SELL mode where scans decrease count

skills.name: List Inventory
skills.description: Display current inventory with codes, names, and counts

skills.name: Quit and Save
skills.description: Exit the scanner and save changes to inventory file

modes.name: add
modes.description: Default mode: scans increase inventory count

modes.name: sell
modes.description: Sell mode: scans decrease inventory count
